query: SpaceX Pentagon AI data center capacity talks amount

mako.raw:
{"query":"SpaceX Pentagon AI data center capacity talks amount","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1704,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://finance.biggo.com/news/3cdf6dcf-20d1-46e6-a791-056dcfde1ba4","title":null,"content":"Elon Musk’s SpaceX is negotiating a multi-billion dollar deal to provide the U.S.
Department of Defense with data center capacity for AI model operations, the Wall Street Journal reported.
SpaceX has recently signed cloud deals with Google for access to 110,000 Nvidia chips and with Anthropic for 300 megawatts of capacity at its Colossus 1 facility.
The negotiations, first reported by the 《Wall Street Journal》 on Friday citing people familiar with the matter, would see SpaceX carve out dedicated computing resources for the Pentagon’s increasingly urgent AI needs.
The proposed deal marks a significant escalation in the Pentagon’s relationship with SpaceX, which already serves as a critical partner for military rocket launches, satellite-based communications through the Starshield program, and missile tracking systems.
That deal alone signaled SpaceX’s intent to monetize the massive GPU clusters it has been building at facilities like Colossus 1 in Memphis, Tennessee.
The 《Wall Street Journal》 emphasized that talks are ongoing and “could still fall apart.” But the mere prospect of Musk’s space company becoming a cut-rate AI infrastructure provider has already reshaped expectations in a market where computing power has become one of the world’s most sought-after commodities."},{"url":"https://wtvbam.com/2026/07/17/musks-spacex-in-talks-to-provide-computing-power-to-the-pentagon-wsj-reports/","title":"Musk’s SpaceX in talks to provide computing power to the Pentagon, WSJ reports | WTVB | 1590 AM · 95.5 FM | The Voice of Branch County","content":"July 17 (Reuters) – Elon Musk’s SpaceX is in talks to ​provide the U.S."},{"url":"https://futurism.com/space/spacex-support-pentagons-ai-models","title":"SpaceX Eager to Support the Pentagon's Lethal AI Models","content":"Musk has rapidly built data centers in Memphis, Tennessee and a lot of that capacity hasn’t been tapped into, with Bloomberg reporting that his AI startup xAI is only using 11 percent of its total computing power."},{"url":"https://stocktwits.com/news-articles/markets/equity/space-x-reportedly-in-talks-to-supply-pentagon-with-ai-computing-power-worth-billions/cZZ7MHGR7MQ","title":"SpaceX Reportedly In Talks To Supply Pentagon With AI Computing Power Worth Billions","content":"The two sides are negotiating an arrangement under which SpaceX would provide computing capacity to the department at a cost of up to several billion dollars, according to a report in the Wall Street Journal.
Amazon, Microsoft, Google and Oracle already provide capacity to the Pentagon.
Elon Musk’s rocket manufacturing and AI company SpaceX (SPCX) is reportedly in talks with the Pentagon to supply billions of dollars' worth of data-center capacity for running AI models.
The potential detail would give the United States Department of Defense more cloud-computing resources to support AI applications across the National Security Agency and warfighters.
SpaceX has already signed cloud-computing deals with Anthropic, Google, and Reflection AI in recent months to rent out data-center capacity for running AI models.","date":"23 hours ago"},{"url":"https://www.aol.com/articles/musks-spacex-talks-computing-power-192708000.html","title":"Musk's SpaceX in talks to supply the Pentagon with computing power, WSJ reports - AOL","content":"In June, SpaceX signed a multi-year cloud services agreement with Alphabet's Google, providing access to about 110,000 Nvidia chips and related computing infrastructure.
Anthropic said in May it had struck a deal to use the full computing power of SpaceX's Colossus 1 facility in Memphis, gaining 300 megawatts of new capacity."},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/business/media-telecom/musks-spacex-talks-provide-computing-power-pentagon-wsj-reports-2026-07-17/","title":"Musk's SpaceX in talks to supply the Pentagon with ...","date":"5 hours ago","content":"5 hours ago — Elon Musk's SpaceX is in talks to provide the ​U.S. Department of Defense with access to data center ‌capacity worth billions of dollars to ..."},{"url":"https://money.usnews.com/investing/news/articles/2026-07-17/musks-spacex-in-talks-to-provide-computing-power-to-the-pentagon-wsj-reports","title":"Musk's SpaceX in Talks to Provide Computing Power to the ...","date":"5 hours ago","content":"5 hours ago — Elon ⁠Musk's ⁠SpaceX is ⁠in talks to provide the U.S. Department of Defense with access to data center ⁠capacity ⁠worth billions of dollars to ..."},{"url":"https://www.marketscreener.com/news/spacex-in-talks-with-pentagon-over-ai-datacenter-capacity-ce7f51dada8ff02c","title":"SpaceX in Talks With Pentagon Over AI Datacenter Capacity","date":"5 hours ago","content":"5 hours ago — SpaceX is in talks with the Defense Department to provide the agency with datacenter capacity worth billions of dollars. Capacity Published on ..."}]}
